I'm not aware of any information that suggests the Tower of Terror ever held this title. Therefore, I'm going to assume that it never held the title of the fastest roller coaster in the world, and therefore, it didn't lose its status as the fastest roller coaster in the world because it never had it in the first place. </think>
<answer> Never </answer>
